inputs.label: Metal Surface Area
inputs.businessContext: Total area of metal to be pickled.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area of metal to be pickled.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale du métal à décaper.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total de metal a decapar.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur moyenne de la couche d'oxyde.
businessContext_i18n.es: Grosor medio de la capa de óxido.

inputs.label: Scale Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the scale (e.g., iron oxide ≈ 5000 kg/m³).

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the scale (e.g., iron oxide ≈ 5000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Zunders (z. B. Eisenoxid ≈ 5000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité de la calamine (ex. oxyde de fer ≈ 5000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad de la capa (ej. óxido de hierro ≈ 5000 kg/m³).

inputs.label: Acid Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of hydrochloric acid by weight (typical 15-20%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Concentration of hydrochloric acid by weight (typical 15-20%).
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración de ácido clorhídrico en peso (típico 15-20%).

inputs.label: Acid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the acid solution (18% HCl ≈ 1.09 kg/L).

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the acid solution (18% HCl ≈ 1.09 kg/L).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité de la solution acide (HCl 18 % ≈ 1,09 kg/L).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad de la solución ácida (HCl al 18% ≈ 1.09 kg/L).

inputs.label: Stoichiometric Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Mass of acid required to dissolve 1 kg of scale, considering chemical reaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of acid required to dissolve 1 kg of scale, considering chemical reaction.
businessContext_i18n.de: Säuremasse, die benötigt wird, um 1 kg Zunder aufzulösen, unter Berücksichtigung der chemischen Reaktion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse d'acide nécessaire pour dissoudre 1 kg de calamine, compte tenu de la réaction chimique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de ácido necesaria para disolver 1 kg de capa, considerando la reacción química.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الحمض المطلوبة لإذابة 1 كجم من القشور، مع مراعاة التفاعل الكيميائي.

inputs.label: Drag-out Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volume of acid solution carried out on metal surface per m².

label_i18n.tr: 1 kg tufalı çözmek için gereken asit kütlesi (kimyasal reaksiyon dikkate alınarak).

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of acid solution carried out on metal surface per m².
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen der Säurelösung, das pro m² auf der Metalloberfläche ausgetragen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume de solution acide entraîné par m² de surface métallique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de solución ácida arrastrado sobre la superficie metálica por m².
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم المحلول الحمضي المطبق على سطح المعدن لكل متر مربع.

inputs.label: Rinse Water Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Volume of rinse water needed per m² of metal surface.

label_i18n.tr: m² başına metal yüzeyinde taşınan asit çözeltisi hacmi.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of rinse water needed per m² of metal surface.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume d'eau de rinçage nécessaire par m² de surface métallique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de agua de enjuague necesario por m² de superficie metálica.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم ماء الشطف المطلوب لكل متر مربع من سطح المعدن.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
